C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc libwilluslib.a CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/ansi.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/array.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/bmp.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/bmpdjvu.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/bmpmupdf.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/dtcompress.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/filelist.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/fontdata.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/fontrender.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/gslpolyfit.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/linux.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/math.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/mem.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/ocr.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/ocrwords.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/pdffonts.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/pdfwrite.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/point2d.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/render.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/strbuf.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/string.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/token.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wfile.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wgs.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wgui.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/willusversion.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/win.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/winbmp.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wincomdlg.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wininet.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/winmbox.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/winshell.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/winshellwapi.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wleptonica.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wmupdf.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wmupdfinfo.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wpdf.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wpdfoutline.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wpdfutil.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wsys.c.obj CMakeFiles/willuslib.dir/wzfile.c.obj
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ranlib.exe libwilluslib.a
